sglang.title: [Feat] Expose logprob options to `sgl.gen` API
sglang.author: huyiwen
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Key changes

Support logprob (proposed in #232)

Fixes

Align the judgment logic of return_logprob and top_logprobs_num with LogitsProcessor
Fix JSONDecodeError when runtime returns a 500 error

sglang.title: Fix the default argument of OpenAI Chat completion
sglang.author: merrymercy

vllm.title: [Bugfix][TPU] Add missing None to model input
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Added None for multi modal args.

vllm.title: [Bugfix][TPU] Fix outlines installation in TPU Dockerfile
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: For some reason, the current TPU dockerfile does not install the correct version of outlines and thus raises an error when starting the OpenAI server. This PR proposes a simple fix for this.

vllm.title: Add support for multi-node on CI
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Add script to run multi-node tests on CI.

vllm.title: [CORE] Adding support for insertion of soft-tuned prompts
vllm.author: SwapnilDreams100
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds support for inserting soft-tuned prompts into the input embeddings (trained using PEFT).
This functionality is required by the IBM team.
Summary of Changes:

New prompt_adapter folder similar to the lora folder to create a LRU cache management system for multiple prompt adapters
New pro

vllm.title: [Speculative Decoding] Medusa Implementation with Top-1 proposer
vllm.author: abhigoyal1997
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR implements the Medusa approach to generate speculations using top-1 predictions of the heads.

vllm.title: [core][distributed] add zmq fallback for broadcasting large objects
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The input to vision language model contains images, which has variable length and can be quite large.
While the shared memory broadcast introduced in #5399 works fine for LLMs, later we find we often need to adjust the buffer size for vision language models.
Estimating the size upper bound can be di

vllm.title: [Bugfix][TPU] Add prompt adapter methods to TPUExecutor
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
After PR #4645 was merged today, the TPU backend has been broken with the following error:
TypeError: Can't instantiate abstract class TPUExecutor with abstract methods add_prompt_adapter, list_prompt_adapters, pin_prompt_adapter, remove_prompt_adapter

This PR fixes the bug by adding the prompt ada

vllm.title: [Doc] Guide for adding multi-modal plugins
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds a new guide for developing custom multi-modal plugins. The guide is mostly a placeholder atm but will become more detailed as we support more types of multi-modal data.
